title: Gemini Omni Tutorial: How to Use Gemini Omni AI for Beginners
summary: A tutorial demonstrating Google Omni Flash for video generation and editing workflows. The video tests physics simulation, character consistency, scene memory, and real footage editing, comparing Omni to Sora and Runway Gen 2 while identifying current limitations and use cases.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master walks through Google Omni Flash for video generation and editing, aimed at beginners. It tests physics simulation, character consistency across shots, scene memory, and editing of real footage, then compares Omni against Sora and Runway Gen 2. The takeaways center on where Omni performs in these tasks, the current limitations it shows, and the practical use cases that emerge from the comparison.
